schema:description: This photograph depicts Martin Yan performing a cooking demonstration during the UC Davis Confucius Institute event, "Chinese Food & Wine Pairing Competition with Martin Yan." Hosted at the UC Davis Alumni Center, this event featured an 8-course meal that included Royal Lion's Head Meatballs, Chicken Lettuce Wrap, Cashew Shrimp, Tangerine Peel Chicken, Twice-Cooked Duck, Shangri-La Beef, Buddha's Feast, and Crispy-Fried Noodles.
schema:name: Martin Yan at "Chinese Food & Wine Pairing Competition with Martin Yan" Event, UC Davis
schema:sdPublisher: UC Davis Library, Archives and Special Collections
